mapper.sql: s.id, s.user_id, s.student_no, s.student_name, s.gender, s.dept_id, d.dept_name, s.major_name, s.grade_year, s.class_name, s.phone, s.email, s.status, s.remark, s.created_by, s.updated_by
mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, s.user_id, s.student_no, s.student_name, s.gender, s.dept_id, d.dept_name, s.major_name, s.grade_year, s.class_name, s.phone, s.email, s.status, u.username AS account_username, u.status AS account_status FROM biz_student s LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = s.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = s.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE
ORDER BY s.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT s.id, s.user_id, s.student_no, s.student_name, s.gender, s.dept_id, d.dept_name, s.major_name, s.grade_year, s.class_name, s.phone, s.email, s.status, u.username AS account_username, u.status AS account_status FROM biz_student s LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = s.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = s.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE
ORDER BY s.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_student s WHERE

SELECT , u.username AS account_username, u.status AS account_status FROM biz_student s LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = s.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = s.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM biz_student s LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = s.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM biz_student s LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = s.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE s.student_no = #{studentNo} AND s.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM biz_student s LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = s.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_student ( user_id, student_no, student_name, gender, dept_id, major_name, grade_year, class_name, phone, email, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{studentNo}, #{studentName}, #{gender}, #{deptId}, #{majorName}, #{gradeYear}, #{className}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_student SET user_id = #{userId}, student_no = #{studentNo}, student_name = #{studentName}, gender = #{gender}, dept_id = #{deptId}, major_name = #{majorName}, grade_year = #{gradeYear}, class_name = #{className}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_student SET deleted = 1, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_student SET user_id = NULL, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
